chapter_title.en: Chapter 106 – The severity of the afflictions of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/336)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/336)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَمْ يُؤْمِنِ اللَّهُ الْمُؤْمِنَ مِنْ هَزَاهِزِ الدُّنْيَا وَ لَكِنَّهُ آمَنَهُ مِنَ الْعَمَى فِيهَا وَ الشَّقَاءِ فِي الْآخِرَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Muhammad Bin Yahya Al Khash’amy, from Muhammad Bin Bahloul Al Abdy who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘Allahazwj does not Secure the Momin from the turbulence of the world, but Heazwj Secures him from the blindness (disbelief) in it, and the misery in the Hereafter’.
en.sarwar: 18. Ali has narrated from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from Muhammad ibn Yahya al-Khath’ami from Muhammad ibn Bulul al-‘Abdi who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Allah has not protected the believers from the turmoil of the world but He has protected them from blindness in it and the wickedness of the next life.’”
